description.en: The dromedary, or Arabian camel, has a single hump and is a vital companion for people living in hot deserts.
description.zh: 单峰骆驼（又称阿拉伯骆驼）只有一个驼峰，是生活在炎热沙漠地区人们极其重要的伙伴。

anatomy.en: They have one hump that stores fat, not water, which they use as an energy reserve. They have long eyelashes and sealable nostrils to keep out blowing sand.
anatomy.zh: 它们有一个驼峰，里面储存的是脂肪而非水分，作为能量储备。它们长着长长的睫毛和可以闭合的鼻孔，用以阻挡风沙。

ecology_and_behavior.en: Dromedaries can survive for weeks without drinking water. When they finally do drink, they can gulp down over 100 liters in just ten minutes!
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 单峰骆驼可以在不喝水的情况下生存数周。当它们终于喝水时，能在短短十分钟内喝下超过100升的水！

habitat_and_distribution.en: They are widely found across North Africa, the Middle East, and parts of India. A large feral population also lives in the deserts of Australia.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 它们广泛分布于北非、中东和印度部分地区。在澳大利亚的沙漠中，也生活着大量的野化种群。
